category_sources: Official RTMPDump homepage calls it a toolkit for RTMP streams.
source_facts.description says it downloads RTMP streaming media.
docs_sources: Official homepage links online rtmpdump and librtmp manpages and serves as the project documentation index.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage gives the source clone URL git://git.ffmpeg.org/rtmpdump.
source_facts.source-archive is https://git.ffmpeg.org/rtmpdump.git, matching the official source host.
tags_sources: Official homepage lists RTMP protocols and the librtmp library.
source_facts.description identifies RTMP streaming media downloading.
